name: @octo/whiteboard-schema
description: Frozen shared whiteboard (Excalidraw) Y.Doc layout constants + normalizeElement rule set for Octo whiteboard v1. Vendored verbatim from boris-clark/octo-whiteboard-schema@v0.2.0 so the FE binding (XIN-25), BE authoritative repair, and Agent path share ONE rule set. Yjs-free / framework-free.
